name: asana-playwright-data-driven-tests
description: Hybrid Playwright data-driven UI automation suite in TypeScript

scripts.test:allure:web: npm run clean:reports && cross-env TARGET_PROJECT="Web Application" node scripts/run-playwright-with-allure-env.js
scripts.test:allure:mobile: npm run clean:reports && cross-env TARGET_PROJECT="Mobile Application" node scripts/run-playwright-with-allure-env.js
scripts.test:allure:docker:web: npm run clean:reports:docker && cross-env TARGET_PROJECT="Web Application" node scripts/run-playwright-with-allure-env.js
scripts.test:allure:docker:mobile: npm run clean:reports:docker && cross-env TARGET_PROJECT="Mobile Application" node scripts/run-playwright-with-allure-env.js
